seoTitle: Lucas Heights vs Luddenham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lucas Heights and Luddenham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lucas Heights vs Luddenham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lucas Heights and Luddenham.
heading: Lucas Heights vs Luddenham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lucas Heights, New South Wales and Luddenham, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Luddenham has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Lucas Heights (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lucas Heights or Luddenham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lucas Heights has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Luddenham scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lucas Heights scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Luddenham scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lucas Heights or Luddenham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Luddenham has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
